steps.title: Spot the partial explanation signal
steps.content: The passage criticizes the energy ladder model as “reductive,” then clarifies: income “of course constrained fuel choice,” yet multiple other factors also influenced decisions. This directly signals that income explains some but not all differences.

steps.title: Match to the answer
steps.content: Choice A captures this: income explains some but not all differences in fuel choice. B incorrectly denies income's effect, C disputes the wrong element of the model, and D confuses whether income affects fuel type or quantity. That matches choice A — A is correct.
